title: Amazon Prime Day Total Online Spending Surpasses Adobe Estimate
description: Online spending across all retailers in the US hit $26.4 billion during Amazon.com Inc.’s annual Prime Day sale, according to Adobe Inc., narrowly beating the firm’s earlier estimate of $26.3 billion.

title: Soaring iPad, Xbox Prices Reveal Pain of Memory Chip Mess
description: Within a span of five hours Thursday, Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. hiked the prices for such popular products as Xbox video-game consoles, Macs and iPads.

title: AI’s Energy Crunch Has Investors Searching for Next IPO Winners
description: The artificial intelligence boom has a power problem, and Wall Street is betting billions on companies that promise to solve it — even if some of the technology hasn’t been fully developed yet.
